name: cortex-id
description: Open source AI-powered IDE — Privacy-first, transparent AI agents

scripts.setup: pnpm install && cd shared-types && pnpm install && pnpm build && cd ../electron && pnpm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && mvn install -q -DskipTests
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,electron -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:frontend" "sleep 12 && pnpm dev:electron"
scripts.build: pnpm build:shared-types && pnpm build:frontend && pnpm build:backend && pnpm build:electron
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npx ng build --configuration production
scripts.test: pnpm test:frontend && pnpm test:backend && pnpm test:electron
scripts.package: pnpm build && cd electron && pnpm package
